siteInfo.name: Manning Metalworks
siteInfo.author: Manning Metalworks
siteInfo.description: Manning Metalworks - Custom metal fabrication and welding services in Morris Plains, NJ. We specialize in custom metal work for residential and commercial clients, including railings, gates, furniture, and more.
siteInfo.keywords: Manning Metalworks, custom metal fabrication, welding services, Morris Plains NJ, railings, gates, furniture

services.name: Precision Metal Fabrication
services.description: Manning Metalworks provides premier residential, commercial, and municipal metal fabrication across the region. We specialize in the complete project lifecycle, from CAD-assisted design and CNC plasma cutting to high-standard AWS certified assembly.

services.name: Expert Repairs and Custom Fabrication
services.description: We offer bespoke metal solutions and restoration services that off-the-shelf products simply cannot provide. Our technicians utilize MIG, TIG, and Stick welding processes to deliver high-strength repairs for everything from heavy machinery to antique ironwork.

services.name: 24/7 Mobile Welding Services
services.description: Our 24/7 mobile welding division serves as a rapid-response unit, bringing a 'shop on wheels' directly to your location. We provide immediate, industrial-grade support for emergency structural failures and machinery repairs at any hour of the day or night.
